retry_reason: Failure of refcount_inc_not_zero indicates the socket is already being freed (refcount zero), which is permanent. Other failures (allocation errors) are also not retryable without changes.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to attach a vxlan_sock to a vxlan_dev, including lookups, refcount management, creation, and hash list insertion. The refcount_inc_not_zero call is only one step within broader logic of associating the socket with the device.
